title: rosa pomifera var. franzonii
intro: Rosa pomifera var. franzonii, also known as the Prickly Wild Rose or Chinese Prickly Rose, is a deciduous shrub that belongs to the Rosaceae family and is native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Rosa pomifera var. franzonii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Rosa pomifera var. franzonii is traditionally prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion, and its extracts are also used in herbal supplements and topical creams.
